visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up shot of an iPhone 15 Pro Max resting on a white, textured knitted surface. The screen displays a lock screen with a large digital clock reading 10:49 and a wallpaper of a corgi dog looking towards the right with its tongue out. A person's hand enters from the bottom to steady the device. (2) A white USB-C cable is inserted into the charging port at the bottom of the phone. The screen flickers as it registers the connection. (3) The camera zooms into the top portion of the screen, focusing on the Dynamic Island. The island expands into a horizontal pill shape to show 'Charging' and the current battery percentage of 71% with a green icon. (4) A red heart icon with '1' inside briefly pops up near the Dynamic Island. The time on the clock updates to 10:50. (5) The screen transitions to a screen recording of the iOS Settings app. A finger scrolls down through the list and taps on the 'Battery' section. (6) In the Battery menu, the camera shows a detailed view of the '71% Charging' status, accompanied by a progress bar and a prediction of the time remaining until it reaches 80%.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: iOS18讓你沒有充電焦慮. (2) [Subtitle]: 開始充電. (3) [Subtitle]: 仔細看動態島下面有出現充電多久即可80%. (4) [Subtitle]: 設定裡電池那邊也會顯示！

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One set of hands is visible interacting with the phone.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hands of the person are visible; they are using a clear protective case on their iPhone.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists primarily of a white, knitted wool blanket or surface with a distinct weave pattern.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A sharp mechanical click occurs as the charging cable is inserted. This is immediately followed by the standard iOS charging chime, a clear, high-fidelity ding. (2) A male narrator with a calm and professional tone begins speaking at a moderate pace. His articulation is sharp and clear. A soft acoustic guitar track plays in the background, providing a warm and steady rhythmic bed. (3) As the narrator explains the charging feature, the music continues at a consistent volume. Subtle tactile sounds of swiping on a screen can be heard under the narration. The overall mix is clean with high vocal prominence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Practical Demonstration -> Expanded Feature Details
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform iPhone users about a new charging status feature in iOS 18. The video aims to demonstrate how the OS now provides estimated times to reach a specific charge level (80%), helping users manage their charging habits and reduce battery-related anxiety.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-contrast visual style with clear text overlays to deliver technical information efficiently. The integration of screen recordings helps ground the feature demonstration in reality.
